name: Larp
recipeInstructions:
1. Adjust the amount of ground hot chili pepper to taste. Serve extra on the side for adding to the dish as desired.
2. Prepare toasted rice by browning raw rice in a hot dry wok or frying pan, then grinding coarsely in a blender, or use browned commercial "cream of rice".
3. Wrap shallot and garlic in aluminum foil and roast on the stove for about 2 minutes per side until scorched. Remove from foil, mash well with a mortar and pestle if available, and set aside.
4. Lightly cook ground beef in a dry pan/wok until pink fades away, then place in a bowl to cool slightly. Mix fish sauce, salt, lime juice, mashed garlic/shallot, coriander seeds, toasted rice, ground hot chili, chopped scallion, and toss with a fork.
5. Serve over lettuce leaves garnished with mint; pair with fresh raw vegetables such as yard-long beans, nappa leaves (select tender inner ones), romaine and other lettuces, celery, etc.
